programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger has been freed and wants to give out CHI to all tribes of Chima, but he has none. He employs a strange Raven alchemist to produce some fake CHI. But the fake CHI has some very unexpected side effects, and the alchemist has an agenda of his own.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Chima is peaceful yet again. Laval and Cragger go on a joyful Speedor cruise. But the Ravens use the peace to move into Eagle Spires. The Eagles try to get rid of them, but the Ravens are very persistent. It will be up to Eris to trick them to leave.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Laval and Cragger attempt to get all the tribes to agree on a lasting peace in Chima, but Crooler creates a strange fog that makes everyone very powerful and angry, especially Cragger.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A night terror is on the hunt at the fall festival and so is the Night Hunter, who appears in the Waking World with a brand-new threat for Mateo.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The barrier to the Waking World has been torn and the Nightmare King invades Brooklyn, where the Dream Chasers must make their final stand!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Missing Z-Blob, Mateo tries to free him to the neglect of his dream chaser duties while the team wrestles with an incursion case and a flock of unusual ravens ignites Izzie's suspicions.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Oz takes the dream chasers to Castle Nocturnia to meet Grand Inspector Royce. Zoey heads to the Grim Realm to confront the Night Hunter and the rest of the team consults the enigmatic Sandman.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Expelled from an exclusive boys school, an underprivileged youth, a gifted student, is suspected of a trustee's murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When an explosion at a construction site kills a boy, McCoy and Kincaid try to exonerate a demolitions expert wrongly convicted of the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The stabbing murder of a husband and wife prompts Briscoe and Logan to investigate Steven Bartlett, an alcoholic who was abused as a child.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After learning controversial therapy may have caused an autistic's death, McCoy must discredit the main witness.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a fellow detective and childhood friend forces Logan to deal with repressed memories about the school he attended.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigations of seemingly unrelated murders of a cab driver and a hit man lead Briscoe and Logan to the cabbie's wife.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives arrest the father of a woman with multiple personalities for the murder of a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A newly elected, gay councilman's companion and his ousted opponent are suspects in the politician's murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A murder victim's mother fatally wounds the prime suspect in the case; then evidence suggests the woman hired her daughter's assailant.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis seeks someone on the Internet with information about a wealthy collegian's murder in a biker bar.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a triple murder case ends with the suspect's acquittal, McCoy and Kincaid investigate the judge assigned to the trial.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When Briscoe and Curtis capture a couple after a violent crime spree, the woman claims she was forced to commit the crimes against her will.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and his new partner investigate murder at a college; McCoy risks a lawyer's disbarment to win a case.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Kincaid prosecutes a case alone when she is certain that a prominent plastic surgeon who is accused of murdering a prostitute is guilty.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate a kidnapping case involving a woman's claim that her infant vanished from a church while she was in the confessional.

programme.title: Mommy's Little Princess
programme.desc: A 10-year-old adopted girl discovers that she is related to a royal German family. Feeling special for the first time, she becomes an entitled, angry child. As her fascination with being a princess grows, the girl begins to lose her sanity.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: In 2008, Casey Anthony was charged with first degree murder for the disappearance of her daughter, Caylee. in new interviews, Robyn Adams shares how Casey lured her into a friendship, and Silvia Hernandez's life was ruined because of the two women.

programme.title: Mommy's Stolen Memories
programme.desc: Mallory's life turns upside-down when her young son, Billy, is drawn to Samantha, a strange woman who whispers to him at the local climbing gym. Billy refuses to reveal Samantha's message and starts acting up.

programme.desc: Katie, a 12-year-old girl, has had a short but rough life. When her mother dies from an apparent suicide, her cousins decide to adopt her. Katie adores her new family and will not let anyone, including her abusive father, take her away from them.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Sumérgete en un día lleno de emociones con Little Angel! Desde campamentos y aventuras piratas hasta visitas al zoológico, competencias de castillos de arena, aventuras heladas y la alegría navideña, ¡cada aventura es un tesoro de alegría y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a los Little Angels en un viaje especial a través de un día lleno de exploración y aprendizaje. Desde ordenar la casa hasta recordar su infancia, cada momento trae nuevos descubrimientos.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Embárcate en un día lleno de alegría junto a Little Angel y sus amigos! Desde expresar su amor por mamá hasta aventuras con juguetes, ¡únete a este viaje lleno de diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Little Angel te invita a unirte a sus divertidas aventuras con canciones. Prepárate para cantar, bailar y reír mientras le dan vida a las canciones infantiles clásicas de la forma más divertida.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un viaje lleno de diversión en el que aprenderás a compartir, lo que potenciará la empatía y el sentimiento de cuidado hacia los demás.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en un viaje en el que atraviesan situaciones inesperadas con valentía y creatividad, demostrando que incluso los pequeños retos pueden superarse con un poco de ayuda de los amigos.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus aventuras llenas de risas y lecciones de vida. Aprenden a tomar decisiones saludables y la alegría de ayudar.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para un armonioso viaje con los Little Angels mientras se sumergen en el mundo de las emociones. Con una melodía pegadiza y un poco de magia, convierten las lágrimas en sonrisas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel para divertirte a salvo. Desde "No hables con extraños" hasta "A salvo en la playa", aprende lecciones importantes mientras disfrutas del parque, de los días de playa y las melodías pegadizas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels para un baño de burbujas lleno de diversión, donde hacen de cuenta que bañarse es divertido, pero con burbujas es la bonanza de la diversión.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Bienvenido al mundo de los pequeños modales, donde los Little Angels enseñarán valiosas lecciones de amabilidad, empatía y buenos modales.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a los Little Angels y aprende sobre sus amigos los animales en esta emocionante aventura que seguro les arrancará muchas sonrisas a los más pequeños.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un día lleno de emoción y asombro. Desde aprender el baile de Baby Shark hasta explorar la magia de mezclar colores, jugar y descubrir sorpresas, ¡es un viaje de diversión y descubrimiento que te dejará sonriendo!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels y disfruta de grandes risas, lecciones y momentos conmovedores mientras crecen.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus tiernos viajes. Desde el amor entre hermanos hasta la perseverancia, pasando por la alegría de los cumpleaños, la diversión en el salón y la salud, ¡todo un tesoro de lecciones envueltas en amor y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en una divertida fiesta familiar, donde se embarcan en una serie de aventuras que celebran las alegrías de la unión y el aprendizaje.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en un divertido viaje lleno de chapuzones sobre la natación segura.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a los Little Angels en un día lleno de diversión, aprendizaje y emoción. Desde la rutina matutina hasta el recreo en la escuela, pasando por el cuidado de los hermanitos y canciones deportivas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en la diversión acuática, embarcados en aventuras que los harán chapotear.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Entra en un mundo de encanto y diversión eternos con Little Angel y las mejores canciones infantiles.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: When Morgan throws Christina an 18th-birthday bash, she cuts LC and Lo from the guest list, so bumping into them the next day at the nail salon was sweet irony. Christina and Morgan then head to NYC for their spring break trip.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: It's spring break in Cabo and anything can happen, especially since LC, Stephen and Kristin are staying in the same hotel. Kristin's wild partying at a club prompts a fight with Stephen, opening the door for him to hook back up with LC.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: After the craziness of Cabo, Kristin invites Stephen to a Blink 182 concert with the hopes of getting back together. LC, Lo, Trey and Dieter also hit the show and when an outsider insults LC and Lo's character, Trey steps up in their defense.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: It's prom time, and while everyone is caught up with who's going with whom, which pair of Charles David shoes look best with their dress, and how to fit everyone in the stretch Hummer-limo, Kristin's biggest concern is a drama-free night with Stephen.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: The seniors charter a yacht to Catalina, but Lo skips out, leaving LC without a buddy to survive camping, kayaking, and Stephen and Kristin's incessant cuddling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Graduation Day
programme.desc: Graduation day is here and the seniors spend time with their families getting ready for the big event. Through a Senior Video Project, the seniors reveal their personal thoughts on graduation, senior year, and life after Laguna.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: Free from school, the gang lives up their last summer together, but when they gather for a final barbeque at Trey's house, the reality of leaving Laguna and each other starts to sink in.

programme.title: Laguna Beach
programme.desc: In the final days before leaving Laguna, Stephen must tie up loose ends, first saying goodbye to Trey, then the surf shop, and finally Kristin. Luckily there's one person he won't have to part with.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Whitney gets offered a chance at her dream job in her New York. Lauren grows nostalgic when she learns her parents are selling their house in Laguna Beach, and Stephanie turns to Spencer for help with Cameron.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer and Heidi ignore the concerns of their families and run away to Mexico to elope. Whitney takes a chance at a dream job in New York City and says goodbye to Lauren and her life in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Lauren and Heidi have a run-in, they put their feud aside and remember why they used to be friends. Spencer and Heidi deal with the fallout of their elopement and Justin shocks Audrina when he whisks her away to Palm Springs.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Heidi crashes Laurens surprise birthday party, the two old friends cry about their disintegrated friendship. Spencer starts a violent fistfight when Cameron accuses him of picking up a bartender.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Spencer's flirtatious ways lead Heidi home to Colorado, where she reconnects with an old boyfriend. Lauren gives Stephanie a piece of her mind for inviting Heidi to her birthday party. Spencer ends a long silence with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: Megan

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were best friends until her pregnancy. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one. At a time when she needs support, the most important people in her life are only adding stress.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban y Aylin comienzan un romance. La llegada del nuevo EX sorprende a todos y la Tablet los manda a una cita de tres. La Sala Tornado pone las cartas sobre la mesa. Brandon toma una decisión importante.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban busca hacer un trío y Aylin busca exclusividad. Llega un nuevo EX y hace que Frida respire de nuevo. Diana esta insegura de Brandon. Kelly es mas territorial con Robbie por culpa de Michelle.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Una dinámica los obliga a decirse las cosas de frente. Michelle y Kelly arreglan sus diferencias en la Sala Tornado. Salen por grupos a disfrutar de Colombia. Festejan el cumpleaños de Diana.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s daughter’s surprise visit home is interrupted when a judge, on a Blue Ribbon panel investigating the assassination of the town Mayor, is accused of sexual assault and seeks Matlock’s counsel.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When his daughter is jailed for contempt Matlock takes over her case. Now it is up to him to uncover the truth behind a sinister cover-up that involves high government officials, including the Chief of Police, in a child pornography ring and a murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A surgical mishap and a malpractice suit aren’t the end of Dr. Bradley Gray’s troubles. He’s been murdered! Jerri Stone’s little sister, Nurse Rachel, is the number one suspect.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock investigates when a friend, Bobby Neil, is accused of murdering a cookie queen who was out to crumble her competitors with a hostile takeover.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A brash multimillionaire, Ellis Blake is held in the slaying of Jeffrey Holden, a handsome, young man who intended to marry Ellis’ daughter – without his blessing or consent.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock suffers a series of mishaps when he tries to find a missing murder witness to clear his client, who’s accused of killing her philandering husband.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When a renowned author is murdered, Matlock defends the accused – the subject of a biography the victim was writing – only to encounter a disturbing revelation about his client midway through the trial.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A nurse is accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Political cartoonist Ronald Winfield is murdered when he exposes a Senator’s infidelity through his comic strip.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Joining forces with an old friend and adversary, Julie March, Matlock attempts to reverse a murder sentence and unravel a case of corruption, conspiracy, and perjury.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock must break a seemingly perfect defense when Arthur Hampton, a blind sculptor, shoots the man responsible for his loss of sight. After waiting many years, Hampton finally takes his revenge on Clay Graham, the playboy responsible for his blindness.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock discovers the private life of a personal trainer includes sizzling secrets that might shatter the reputations of several socialites. Harry Slade puts Casanova to shame, but it costs him his life.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A friend of Matlock’s, Mike Wilson, has been murdered and his wife has been accused of the crime.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock and Michelle Thomas are exposed to a quick course in trash television when a vicious talk show host, Don Galloway, humiliates three prominent women to boost his ratings.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's new sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins, "Poldark") arrives on the day after the murder of a local shrew occurs, and he is immediately put to work.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Long-suppressed family secrets, stolen artifacts and a thirty-year-old death at a Celtic burial site result in a series of murders in present-day Midsomer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Midsomer hosts its 12th Annual Literary Festival, an author is found with his neck broken. More writers will die before the winner of the competition is announced.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer Worthy's beloved local pub figures in a case involving unrequited love, secret business deals, and passionate affairs.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer comes closer to its boiling point when a priest is burned to death inside the effigy of a straw woman and more people burst into flames spontaneously, as though by witchcraft.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Nine years after Ferdy Villers killed himself, his family reunites for Christmas, unaware that someone is out for revenge.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Undertaker Patrick Pennyman is found dead with his wrists slashed and suspicion turns towards a spiritualist church.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: During a regatta, the body of Rowing Club chairman Guy Sweetman is found bludgeoned and drowned. Bachelor Sweetman was prolifically promiscuous so jealousy would seem to be the motive.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy travels to Dubai, United Arab Emirates, to earn a listing that could change her life; she hangs out with Caroline Stanbury; Altman hunts down a mystery property in Malibu to house luxury cars; Flagg and Bobby embark on the ultimate house hunt.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: James and David throw a Great Gatsby-themed open house in an effort to sell a Bel Air estate; Tracy launches her Dubai high-rise to a crowd in Los Angeles; Flagg and Altman try to work together to secure the most sought after listing in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Sworn enemies Altman and Flagg team up in hopes of landing a major listing in La Jolla; Tracy gets creative to sell a Hollywood Hills artists enclave; James and David hit the hiking trails of LA to garner interest in a historic bungalow.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Flagg and Altman launch their La Jolla co-list with a black tie affair, but the event turns sour with some real estate drama between Tracy and the Brits.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Altman hosts a rockin' open house for a party pad that once belonged to Howard Hughes; Flagg tries to find the perfect family house for a very particular buyer; James and David look to expand their territory.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Altman hunts for his own flagship office space to create some distance from Fredrik Eklund, a former friend who is trying to make his mark on both coasts; Flagg tries to convince his hesitant seller to put in an offer or lose the home forever.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Tracy tries to balance her new portfolio with her demanding developer, who has high expectations, and a rocky past with Altman; James and David are up against the clock to find a pregnant client her dream home before she goes into labor.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Altman struggles to retain an unrealistic seller; Tracy tries to attract interest for a new construction with mid-century bones; Flagg's resort-style trophy listing proves more challenging than expected.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: James and David host a backyard barbecue for their new family-oriented estate; Altman goes after a new modern home in his Bird Streets territory; Flagg tries to find a dream home in historic Hollywood Hills for actress Becca Tobin ("Glee").

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: James and David experience difficulties with their Santa Monica gem, as the sellers have their own ideas about price and who the buyers should be.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: James and David work with a long-time client Zach Vella to list an architectural gem, but Fredrik's arrival in Los Angeles is putting the pressure on them to get it sold.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Altman lists a castle in Beverly Ridge; Flagg finds himself opposite Fredrik, trying to negotiate a deal while getting a fair price for his client; James and David are under pressure to get their latest Zach Vella listing sold.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Altman throws an epic launch event for a modern with a $48 million price tag and a social media twist; Tracy gets creative to find a buyer for her new WeHo modern; Los Angeles wildfires have a devastating impact on the market.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Altman and Tracy co-list a historic Hollywood estate previously owned by Hollywood legend John Barrymore; James and David go all-in on their new East Coast traditional.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Altman returns to his roots in the Bird Streets neighborhood to sell a modern masterpiece but has a difficult time keeping the sellers happy; Flagg adjusts to a remote work lifestyle and secretly visits Tracy's house to see an old companion.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The resurgence of neo-Nazism in Germany takes the IMF to Bavaria, where Marcus von Frank (Hans Gudegast) threatens to become a second Hitler.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The imagination of the IMF is put to the test when a massive spy ring in the U.S. headed by fashion photographer, David Redding, threatens to cripple the country with a deadly pneumonic plague.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans, mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons, are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF is assigned to recover microfilm plans for manipulating international gold reserves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps comes to the aid of a personal friend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF sets out to destroy a murder-for-hire organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF foils the attempts of a once-powerful communist to regain power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF goes to the aid of a friendly South American government which has been overthrown by revolutionaries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy lending library and sees children playing with different kinds of toys. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday learns to ride his bike, and also learns to share it!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a raincoat and talks about things to do inside. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Aberlin dances in the rain. X flies to slide down a rainbow. Daniel wants to learn Tai Chi to stop his scary dreams.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers hangs a fish mobile, then goes to see some killer whales swim and play. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine teaches dance and says males weren't invited to the studio because they don't dance.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sam Weber and sees him dance. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday XIII goes to Lady Elaine's dance school, and she turns him away claiming that men can't dance. Sam Weber arrives and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps to weave a scarf. Henrietta Pussycat's ballet teacher, Miss Cloud, does not speak but communicates with movement. The Junior Tamburitzans perform two folk dances. Mister Rogers talks about making up stories and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers, with the help of his ventriloquist dummy, learns that sign language and talking can be two different ways of saying the same thing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of children's television programs from around the world. Queen Sara Saturday and Mayor Maggie prepare for their job switch. Nancy Caterpillar is anxious to transition into being a butterfly.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a dog. Bob Trow stops by with the Bob Dog costume. Prince Tuesday fears that the change will be permanent. Neighbor Aber arrives to explain that the switch is just temporary.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a clown mask. "Mayor" Sara prepares a speech as two lost clowns arrive. To help the clowns find their way to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Queen Sara suggests that she and Mayor Maggie trade jobs.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Nancy Caterpillar sees herself in a mirror and realizes that she is very special the way she is. She turns into a butterfly. Mister Rogers visits the circus and sees Jeff Gabel apply his clown make-up.

programme.title: ONE Fight Night
programme.desc: Heavyweight titans collide as Kryklia meets Knowles in a thunderous Muay Thai main event.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo and Fujitora's agreement to not engage each other lasts for the moment - meaning all eyes are turned towards taking down the Straw Hats and claiming the rewards! And as Luffy starts heading to the Royal Palace, Fujitora stands in his way!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Usopp, the Tontattas and the others make moves to rejoin Luffy as Doflamingo's deadly game rages on! Meanwhile, Kin'emon makes it to the trash heap in his search for his friend Kanjuro - just as Pica emerges in the town.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy & the others recovering from Pica's attack, the game is afoot! Luffy has just enough time to regroup and set out to find Doflamingo, only to find that the dastardly Warlord has more enemies than he might realize! A strange argument breaks out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao and Elizabello successfully break Pica's giant arm but the rock giant is unfazed and starts throwing even more destructive punches at Luffy and his band of unwanted collaborators! Meanwhile, Navy Admiral Fujitora moves into action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Moocy fast approach the showdown with Doflamingo - while the others with a beef against him continue to tag along. Meanwhile, Violet finds the key to Law's handcuffs, and Rebecca pledges to deliver it to him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes headway toward Doflamingo's refuge, making his way through Doflamingo's guards, while down below Admiral Fujitora faces off against Sabo, who has the power of the Fire Fist from eating the Flare-Flare Fruit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy cuts a lucky break as Kelly Funk shows him a shortcut to the Palace! But all may not be as it seems... Meanwhile, Franky and Zoro are locked in one-on-one duels, while Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo enlist the help of the Tontattas.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Penned in at the bottom of a well, Luffy and Law are caught in a trap! But someone has come to save them who they least expect! Meanwhile, the Tontattas help Franky break in to the SMILE factory, and Bartolomeo resorts to tactics he used in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas locate their captive comrades and seem to be able to get the message to them - the prison break is on! Meanwhile, heavy-hitters from the Colosseum turn from wringing each other's necks towards a unified plan.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hidden far underground, Kin'emon finds his old friend Kanjuro whose powers allow the two to, quickly, but not elegantly, escape to the surface! Meanwhile, Cavendish shares his fears that the "Birdcage" game Doflamingo is playing has been rigged all along.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are in full revolt! But can they keep their wits about them long enough to make it out? Meanwhile, Zoro finally gains the upper hand against Pica, and Franky finds a way to deal with Señor Pink.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky finally makes it into the factory and the Tontattas are reunited with their captive friends! But Princess Mansherry is nowhere to be found. Factory manager Kuween becomes irate when ignored and launches an attack on Franky.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo draw closer to the Flower Field on the fourth level of the Royal Palace plateau, but a sudden attack by Gladius' exploding spheres sends Robin and Bartolomeo hurtling towards the level below.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca makes it to the Flower Field alone, but unfortunately finds company there that is less than friendly! Meanwhile, Bartolomeo pushes himself to the limit in order to help Luffy advance, but does he leave himself vulnerable in the process?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Diamante has Rebecca pinned and completely overpowered. If only the Soldier-san of her youth were able to protect her! Meanwhile, Luffy and Law finally surmount incredible odds to land themselves in striking distance of Doflamingo.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp uses Viola's Clairvoyance to prepare his ammunition to take Sugar out! But the slightest hesitation now will spell disaster, and the end of Luffy! Luckily for the Straw Hats, Usopp's ammunition has been specially designed for this situation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The final showdown with Doflamingo begins, but the Warlord still has several tricks up his sleeve - including turning one of Luffy's own friends against him! Meanwhile Franky and Señor Pink are in a standoff to find out who is the coolest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All hopes rest on Luffy and Law being able to take down Doflamingo; but the Warlord has other plans in mind as he gives the two the fight of their lives, and reveals his true, shocking history! Meanwhile, Sabo finds out Fujitora's true intention…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Fujitora's stalemate arousing suspicion in the Navy ranks, Law and Luffy stand seconds away from execution at the hand of Doflamingo! But before he dispatches them both, he shares the secret of his sway over the Celestial Dragons!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The horrible secret of Flevance, the White Town, is revealed, giving clues to Law's traumatic past! A rage born from the lies of the World Government created a child who had the will to kill Corazon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law's attack on Corazon looks less successful than he thought! And after he's accepted into the Doflamingo Family, Corazon's mysterious silence hides a fact that may save Law's life - and a hidden danger Law must face in Doflamingo himself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Things grow stranger for Law as he learns the secret behind why Corazon feigns being mute! But the mysterious Corazon's actions are only beginning to baffle Law as he takes him on a journey to cure his White Lead Disease.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Corazon's double-dealing with the Navy raises suspicions both with Doflamingo and Law. But all that is secondary as Corazon finally has a chance to grab the Op-Op Fruit during a staged handoff arranged by the Government.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Op-Op Fruit is in Corazon's hands! But the price he paid to get it might be too high... When Law goes for help, unfortunate coincidences intervene and leave the two vulnerable! Meanwhile, Doflamingo and his clan finally land at Minion Island.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo & his Family begin to zero in on Corazon and Law's whereabouts, but Corazon has a plan to hide Law long enough to let him escape, even if that means sacrificing his own life. A chain of lucky coincidences allows the plan to be set into motion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Violet runs down the status of the open battles raging in Dressrosa - the Straw Hats, the Tontattas, the executives of the Doflamingo Family - all of them clash around the island, but it's Law's revelation to Doflamingo that moves the action forward!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy continues to battle Fake-mingo, but keeps accidentally battling Bellamy instead. Meanwhile the tide of battle turns against Law as painful scars from the past resurface. And Zoro gets unexpected help in his battle with Pica.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a professional basketball star is gunned down in his hometown of Memphis, Tenn., the case goes cold for nearly a decade; after a new team of investigators takes over, it uncovers the missing murder weapon and a mastermind close to home court.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A 62-year-old man bails his stepdaughter out of jail for attempted murder and is soon found dead, but investigators learn his death may not be what it seems.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Texas Rangers are brought in to investigate the most recent death when a San Angelo, Texas, woman loses three romantic partners in the span of three years.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Years after a beloved father is accidentally shot in his home, the family matriarch mysteriously vanishes; as a second investigation launches, a shocking confession reveals a family secret about how far a son is willing to go for his mother.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A 911 call in an upscale neighborhood leads police to the bodies of a mother and daughter in what appears to be a murder-suicide; investigators discover a trail of deceit that exposes an unexpected killer.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A 32-year-old man vanishes in Fort Meyers, Fla., and police quickly link an abandoned, blood soaked vehicle to his case, but investigators must determine if this missing man is a victim or killer.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Investigators follow a surveillance trail to uncover the events that led to the death of an Arizona man, who is shot in his garage before he is able to read the results of a paternity test.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a loving father is gunned down in upstate New York, a hunt for the gunman crosses state lines; as several suspects are brought in, investigators must determine who's telling the truth to reveal the mastermind.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Texas woman discovers her husband's brutally stabbed body in their ransacked home and police suspect he was the victim of a robbery gone wrong, but the investigation reveals a torrid love affair.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After what appears to be a fatal road rage incident, authorities in Clifton, Ariz., follow a trail of recovered text messages that suggest this was no random attack, but instead a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Florida woman's search for her missing husband takes a turn when his body is found in a landfill; as detectives dig into his home life, the victim's family becomes a crucial link to uncovering the truth.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A beloved psychologist is found murdered and left in the trunk of a car in the Nevada desert; as the strange case unfolds, police discover he may have been the victim of a model aiming to maintain her lavish lifestyle.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Peruvian healthcare worker gets a second chance at love until he's found murdered in his apartment; investigators set out to discover whether his new bride is a grieving widow or a femme fatale.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A healthcare worker is viciously attacked in her home with only her daughter as a witness; police must follow the clues at the scene to discover the truth behind the attack.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Firefighters are called to the scene of an Iowa family's home to find the residence up in flames; as the smoke clears, they discover the charred remains of a man and question whether the fire and his death were truly accidental.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The fatal shooting of a well-known San Antonio rapper puts the community on high alert as police take part in a manhunt to track down the killer; as they piece together the evidence, witnesses point the finger at a scorned lover fueled by rage.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A woman pursuing her dreams is found drugged in her home; across New York, another person with similar symptoms comes forward, and authorities connect the cases, exposing an international fugitive with a ruthless pattern.

programme.title: Critical Kingdoms: Stories of Hope

programme.title: Nature

programme.desc: Delve into the deadly battles that mold Giorno into an indispensable member of the Passione gang as he and his allies fight to protect Trish and themselves against outlandish acts of violence by members of the Hitman team.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ready to escort Trish by train, the gang finds on the platform a lone turtle lingering by the drinking fountain, just as the boss instructed. But Bucciarati is stumped—departure is imminent, the enemy is closing in, and the cryptic key appears useless.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and gang hide inside a turtle aboard their train hurtling toward Florence as Mista fights to keep Pesci's body-piercing fish hook from ensnaring his brain. Prosciutto, meanwhile, has released his Stand, rapidly aging everyone on board.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: To save his squad, Bucciarati risks all by grabbing hold of Prosciutto and hurling himself off the speeding train, only to be saved by Pesci’s hook. Now, as Pesci savagely fishes for his victim’s heart, Bucciarati’s resolve reaches stunning heights.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and crew head to Venice by car, after a near-death encounter with Pesci. Unbeknownst to them, Melone from the Hitman Team has created an atomizing ancillary Stand from Bruno’s blood and the body of an unsuspecting female train passenger.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno fights transmutation with transmutation as he weaponizes his own severed hand and imbues inanimate objects with life against Melone’s baby Stand. Giorno and team now must learn that the road ahead to Santa Lucia train station is paved with ice.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ghiaccio's Stand, White Ice is able to envelop him like a bodysuit and able to freeze everything around him to extremely low temperatures. Giorno and Mista somewhat make it to Venice, despite being partially frozen by Ghiaccio...

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: By revealing to each other a fearless embrace of the unknown, Giorno and Mista emerge victorious against Ghiaccio. Now, a single member of Bruno’s group must face a single bell tower, a single elevator shaft, and a single menacing task.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: In the crypt of a Venetian church, Bruno discovers not only the brutal truth behind the Boss’s true intentions but also the unstoppable Stand power he wields, a power that leaves Bruno in a pool of blood and in a moral quandary.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Peer into the complex personal pasts of Bucciarati and his fellow gang members, and uncover the thread that unites this diverse group of fighters into a single team and single expression of resolve.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno and team, now self-chosen traitors, learn from Trish during a moment of calm at a Venetian café a trip to Sardegna is vital. Chaos, then, erupts as Narancia loses his tongue and ability to speak the truth.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: As Giorno is teleported between puddles with Squalo’s shark attached firmly to his jugular, Narancia tries to sniff out the perpetrator using his CO2 tracer but is inhibited by Tiziano’s tongue-fusing Stand, frustrating himself and Bruno’s team.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno et al head to Marco Polo airport to venture to Sardegna to discover the truth behind Trish’s father. On the tarmac, however, is a swollen, neckless Stand user who, the team discovers while airborne, is linked to the freshly severed fingers onboard

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: At cruising altitude, Trish faces a voracious and fleshy mass of a Stand that strikes at the slightest movement. Meanwhile, Giorno’s incessantly pulsating broach, the key to the team’s survival, lies waiting—as does an unseen force within Trish.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno and team make an emergency landing in Sardegna where the Hitman Team leader, Risotto, is also determined to uncover a certain mystery. Doppio, a timid, wide-eyed teen, the result of a seemingly impossible pregnancy, has his own goals on the island.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Having discovered there is more to skittish Doppio than meets the eye, Risotto uses his Stand to manifest various metallic instruments of torture from within his enemy. Fortunately for Doppio, a way to foresee the inevitable offers a glimmer of hope.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: A picturesque Sardinian cliff becomes the bloody backdrop to Doppio’s sudden dominance over Risotto, courtesy of Narancia’s own Stand. On the beach below, Abbacchio works to rewind time 15 years to identify the identity of a certain photographer.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Witness destiny unfold for Trish and the rest of Bruno’s team as her father’s cryptic presence and arcane abilities pull the crew into battles of unspeakable brutality.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: With Abbacchio’s replaying ability interminably stamped in stone, Bruno and team analyze the cryptic face and fingerprints left behind when a mysterious call arrives.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: No sooner than Bruno and team set foot on the shore near Rome the team finds a flesh-eating mold devouring everyone in sight. It's the work of Cioccolata, made worse by his partner Secco, who records the tortured faces of his victims to be viewed later.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Branching off from Bruno, who opts to tackle the underground swimmer Secco, Giorno and Mista chase Cioccolata as he flies to spread rotten ruin upon Rome. Their battles unfold in front of a mystery ally silently awaiting their arrival at the Colosseum.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: One fierce battle ends in Cioccolata’s defeat, but another unfolds after Secco listens to Cioccolata’s revealing final voicemail. Bucciarati sinks into an intense underground struggle to stop Secco from reaching the secret stationed at the Colosseum.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: The curtains are down on his skirmish with Secco, but Bucciarati must race against time to reach the Colosseum as he realizes his body is nearing the end of the line. Unfortunately, he’s not the only one who catches on to his deteriorating condition.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: RiffTrax: Karate Cop
programme.desc: John Travis (Ron Marchini) is back! Played a cop, possibly the Omega Cop? Well he's back! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Samurai Cop
programme.desc: RiffTrax takes on one of the most loved Z-grade action films of the early 90s: Samurai Cop. The cop they call Samurai takes himself and his fabulous hair (really, it is an amazing thing to behold) to Los Angeles from a faraway land they call San Diego.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: Fist of Fury! The 1972 Bruce Lee classic! Not to be confused with Fists of Fury, or Jackie Chan's New Fists of Fury, or Fist of Fury II starring Bruce Li (who himself is not to be confused with Bruce Lee).

programme.title: RiffTrax: A Dangerous Man
programme.desc: Please join us for the first Seagal movie in our history: A Dangerous Man. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Dangerous Men
programme.desc: There is absolutely nothing else in the RiffTrax catalog like Dangerous Men. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Silent Rage
programme.desc: You'll laugh, you'll cry, and you probably won't be so silent about the great deal of rage you'll feel. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin, and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos luchan por salvar a un joven traído a urgencias congelado y sin pulso; un hombre se enferma de muerte mientras asiste a su propia fiesta de aniversario.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de un resort debe tratar a un hombre gravemente herido por la hélice de un barco; y la sala de emergencias se detiene cuando las computadoras y la enfermera jefe no funcionan.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente es mordido por una serpiente. El pecho de un paciente con VIH explota y un hombre de 600 libras debe entrar en la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una niña entra a la sala de emergencias y no puede moverse de la cintura para abajo. Sus padres están enojados cuando los médicos la enviaron a su casa una semana antes.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una niña, recientemente golpeada por un disco de hockey, ahora está misteriosamente paralizada de cintura para abajo; un joven se queja de un terrible dolor de cabeza.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La Diputada del Sheriff es herida en un tiroteo. El paciente está vivo durante la RCP y muere cada vez que se detiene. Después de dos horas, el Dr. Jerome Hoffman no puede reanimar el corazón y debe decirle al paciente que deben dejarlo morir.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos pacientes tienen extrañas lesiones de pesca; un instructor de artes marciales sufre dolores abdominales; cuando las víctimas adolescentes de un accidente automovilístico llenan su pequeña sala de emergencias, un médico debe tomar decisiones críticas.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Toda una fraternidad está plagada de orina azul; una mujer embarazada puede perder a su bebé por una picadura de araña; y un paciente en coma resulta ser un traficante de drogas que tragó heroína.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer llega a la sala de emergencias con un problema respiratorio difícil de diagnosticar.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una víctima de mordedura de serpiente puede morir en la sala de emergencias porque el antiveneno para salvar vidas es escaso

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre entra en shock anafiláctico; un tipo rudo teme a las agujas; un hombre se apuñala con una espada ninja; Un paciente cree que necesita un exorcismo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un cirujano requiere tratamiento urgente tras caer de una cama al tratar de ayudar a su paciente; un hombre que llega con la muñeca cortada revela un secreto sorprendente.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una pila de paneles de yeso se derrumba sobre un niño de 12 años. Cuando una mujer griega se queja de dolor abdominal, la Dra. Angelique Campen está decidida a descubrir la causa, a pesar de que otros médicos no han encontrado nada.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una aparente víctima de un tiroteo le falta la nariz; una niña se deteriora ante los ojos de su familia por un caso grave de meningitis; un médico lucha por salvar a un paciente suicida.
